overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive, modular, web-based School Management ERP for Indian schools. It is a fully mobile-optimized PWA supporting all user roles with MySQL backend on cPanel. Features include student management, fees collection, attendance (face recognition, QR, RFID, biometric), online exams with auto-grading, GPS transport tracking, library management, parent push notifications, student performance analytics, and bulk WhatsApp/SMS broadcast.
features: AI Face Recognition Attendance — camera auto-marks students present on entry
UPI QR Code Payment — GPay/PhonePe QR on fee collection screen, auto-updates fee register
Online Exam + Auto-Grading — MCQ tests assigned to classes, auto-graded results
Parent PWA Push Notifications — instant alerts for attendance, fees due, and results
Student Performance Analytics — charts for marks trend, attendance %, and fees history
Library + Barcode Scanning — issue/return books, overdue reminders, barcode support
GPS Transport Tracking — live bus location for parents via driver's phone
Bulk WhatsApp/SMS Broadcast — send circulars, results, timetables to all parents
Role-based access control for all user types (Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Parent, Student, Driver)
Multi-school/branch support with infinite session management
Complete fee management with UPI QR payment integration
PWA installable on Android/iOS with offline support
